name: Vengeful Punch
rules: If the Pokémon this card is attached to is Knocked Out by damage from an attack from your opponent's Pokémon, put 4 damage counters on the Attacking Pokémon. | You may attach any number of Pokémon Tools to your Pokémon during your turn. name: Vitality Band
rules: The attacks of the Pokémon this card is attached to do 10 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance). | Attach a Pokémon Tool to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached.
